title: Development trend of resin raw materials in my country
contentHtml:
尽管产能不断增加（包括煤化工项目），但我国乙烯对外依存度居高不下，达51%。合成树脂对外依存度为28%。
According to the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, my country's ethylene output in 2014 was 17.044 million tons, an increase of 7.6%; synthetic resin output was 69.507 million tons, an increase of 10.3%. Net imports of ethylene equivalent were 18.6 million tons, an increase of 2.6%; synthetic resin imports were 32.153 million tons, an increase of 2.9%.
During this year, ethylene production capacity was 800,000 tons and 1 million tons of production capacity was under construction. The coal-to-olefins production capacity is 4.53 million tons (including 1.07 million tons of purchased methanol-to-olefins), an increase of 78.3%; the output is 2.366 million tons, an increase of 31.4%.
On the one hand, high-end products are still heavily dependent on imports. On the other hand, the demand for bulk primary products has slowed down, resulting in a 16.5% drop in profits from the main business of synthetic resins to 26.62 billion yuan, with a profit margin of only 3.1%.
The proportion of differentiated ethylene products and mid-to-high-end products is relatively low. The supply of downstream high-end products such as high-value-added polyethylene special materials, polyethylene vinyl acetate (EVA), and ethylene-propylene rubber is insufficient, and market development is not paid enough attention to.
The Raw Materials Department of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology plans to strengthen planning and strategic guidance in 2015, compile the "13th Five-Year Plan" petrochemical industry development plan, optimize the layout of key industries such as ethylene, paraxylene (PX), diphenylmethane diisocyanate (MDI), and guide the orderly and stable development of the modern coal chemical industry. In the chemical industry, we will implement strategies such as the "Belt and Road Initiative", Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated development, and the Yangtze River Economic Belt to cultivate new competitive advantages and growth points.
At the same time, it will also guide powerful enterprises to go global on a large scale, cultivate overseas bases such as coal chemical industry, improve resource and energy security capabilities, and enhance domestic deep processing capabilities of resources.
In addition, it will also promote close cooperation with downstream industries. Expand the application of water-based coatings, polyvinyl chloride (PVC), polyurethane insulation materials, etc. in green buildings; vigorously develop electronic chemicals; and expand the application of engineering plastics, high-performance fibers and composite materials in high-end equipment.
The petrochemical industry is expected to maintain steady development in 2015, with ethylene production increasing slightly to about 18 million tons.
titleZh: 我国树脂原料发展趋势
contentHtmlZh:
尽管产能不断增加（包括煤化工项目），但我国乙烯对外依存度居高不下，达51%。合成树脂对外依存度为28%。
　　据工信部，我国2014年乙烯产量1704.4万吨，增长7.6%; 合成树脂产量6950.7万吨，增长10.3%。乙烯当量净进口量1860万吨，增长2.6%；合成树脂进口3215.3万吨，增长2.9%。
　　这一年里，乙烯建成产能80万吨，在建产能100万吨。煤制烯烃产能453万吨（含外购甲醇制烯烃107万吨），增长78.3%；产量236.6万吨，增长31.4%。
　　一方面高端产品仍然严重依赖进口，另一方面大宗初级产品需求放缓，导致合成树脂主营业务利润下降16.5%至266.2亿元，利润率仅为3.1%。
　　乙烯差异化产品和中高端产品比例相对较低，下游高附加值的聚乙烯专用料、聚乙烯醋酸乙烯脂（EVA）、乙丙橡胶等高端产品供应不足，市场开发重视不够。
　　工信部原材料司计划在2015年加强规划战略引领，编制"十三五"石化化工行业发展规划，优化乙烯、对二甲苯（PX）、二苯基甲烷二异氰酸 酯（MDI）等重点产业布局，引导现代煤化工产业有序稳定发展。在化工行业落实"一带一路"、京津冀协同发展、长江经济带等 战略，培育新的竞争优势和增长点。
　　　同时还将指导有实力的企业大规模走出去，培育煤化工等境外基地，提高资源能源保障能力，提升资源国深加工能力。
另外也将推动与下游产业密切合作。扩大水性涂料、聚氯乙烯（PVC）、聚氨酯保温材料等在绿色 建筑中的应用；大力发展电子化学品；并扩大工程塑料、高性能纤维及复合材料等在高端装备中的应用。
　　预计2015年石化产业将保持平稳发展，乙烯产量略有增长，约1800万吨。
